issue_summary: Removed redundant exception "throws" clauses. Javadoc cleanup. Throwing "NoDataException" instead of "ZeroException" when row or column data is missing.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Create a new FieldMatrix<T> with the supplied row and column dimensions.
     *
     * @param field field to which the elements belong
     * @param rowDimension  the number of rows in the new matrix
     * @param columnDimension  the number of columns in the new matrix
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if row or column dimension is not
     *  positive
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Create a new {@code FieldMatrix<T>} with the supplied row and column dimensions.
     *
     * @param field Field to which the elements belong.
     * @param rowDimension Number of rows in the new matrix.
     * @param columnDimension Number of columns in the new matrix.
     * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.NotStrictlyPositiveException
     * if row or column dimension is not positive.
     */
